data.title: FalconX offers first forwards market linked to Ethereum staking yields, allowing institutions to hedge the network's rate.
data.description: FalconX has recently introduced the initial forwards market linked to Ethereum staking yields, offering institutions an opportunity to mitigate risks associated with the network’s intrinsic rate. This move provides a platform for investors to engage in derivatives trading in relation to Ethereum staking yields.

data.title: UR, China's top live fashion brand, collaborated with Tmall for a third time for a Super Brand Day gala in Shanghai.
data.description: In the evening of September 23, 2025, in Guangzhou, URBAN REVIVO (UR), a prominent live fashion brand in China, collaborated with Tmall for the third occasion to organize an impressive Super Brand Day fashion gala held at Shanghai's 1862 Fashion and Art Center. This event showcased the latest trends and styles, emphasizing UR's position as a leading fashion brand in China.

data.title: Iyuno expands São Paulo facility to 1,355 sqm, strengthening global network with 2025 tech upgrades.
data.description: A new facility spanning 1,355 square meters has been established, integrating modern technology with the creative essence of Iyuno Brazil. Located in São Paulo, this studio revamp follows recent upgrades in the United States and Mexico. The unveiling is set for September 24, 2025, in BURBANK, California. The renovations highlight Iyuno's commitment to innovation and hospitality, embodying a fresh and advanced approach in the industry.

data.title: Beard Papa's opens in San Diego on Oct 4, 2025, bringing signature cream puffs to Kearny Mesa area.
data.description: A well-known Japanese dessert brand known for its devoted fan base introduces its famous cream puffs to the Kearny Mesa neighborhood in San Diego. The world-renowned chain, Beard Papa's, recognized for its delectable and organic cream puffs, has recently opened its latest outlet in the area. The brand’s arrival has generated a buzz among dessert enthusiasts, eager to sample their signature treats.

data.title: T-Mobile report reveals U.S. Latino mobile trends at Velocity Conference, highlighting culture and connectivity.
data.description: Today, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) released its Conectados: U.S. Latino Mobile Trends Report, providing insights into how U.S. Latinos utilize mobile technology for connectivity, opportunity pursuit, and cultural engagement in a digital-centric society. The report was disclosed at the Velocity Conference in Los Angeles, attended by business executives discussing the blend of culture, commerce, and technology. Latinos constitute a significant portion of the population using mobile technology for various purposes.

data.title: Azure Printed Homes wins Most Fundable Companies® 2025 award by Pepperdine's program. 2,300+ companies applied from 50 states.
data.description: In California, Azure Printed Homes, a leader in sustainable 3D-printed modular and prefab housing, has been recognized as one of the top 14 Most Fundable Companies® (MFC) for 2025 by the Pepperdine Graziadio Business School program. This prestigious award acknowledges startups with exceptional fundamentals, growth potential, and investor appeal. Over 2,300 companies across all 50 states vied for this recognition. The selection process entailed a thorough evaluation, including comprehensive applications.

data.title: New Richmond American community with 121 homesites to open in Marana, AZ in 2026 as part of Dove Mountain masterplan.
data.description: Richmond American Homes of Arizona, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., has acquired 121 homesites in Dove Mountain, Marana. The new addition to the masterplan is set to open in September 2026, marking a significant development in the region.
